THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARA, ALEJANDRO LARA, ANNA HERNANDEZ, MAURICE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2952 FOLSOM ST. #4, S.F., STAYED UNTIL FEB-05-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. ON OR BEFORE 1/31/98 DEFT DISM W/PREJUDICE ALL MATTERS BEFORE S.F. RENT BOARD. $975- SEC DEP FORFEITED TO PLTF. DFT IS SOLE OCCUPANT. NO FURTHER STAYS. DEFT WAIVES ALL CLAIMS. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. IF DEFT FAILS TO COMPLY, DFT TO PAY $2,317- PLUS ATTY REASONABLE ATTY FEES.
